USC Catalogue 2025-2026

Computer Science (BS)

The minimum requirement for the degree is 128 units.

A grade of C (2.0) or better is required for each of the core courses.

Composition/Writing Requirements (8 Units)

  • WRIT 150 Writing and Critical Reasoning Units: 4
  • WRIT 340 Advanced Writing Units: 4

General Education (24 Units)

  • General Education Units: 24

Engineering (2 units)

  • ENGR 102 Engineering Freshman Academy Units: 2

Computer Science (46 units)

  • CSCI 102L Introduction to Programming Units: 2
  • CSCI 103L Object Oriented Programming Units: 4

Free Electives (4 Units)

Total Units: 128
